title: erigeron remyi
intro: Erigeron remyi, also known as Dwarf Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Erigeron remyi include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
